title: FleetEntryOverlay
description: Editorial overlay per fleet entry per locale (ADR-017 / PRD-012 v0.2 Phase G). Optional override for name + tagline + best_known_for, plus a translatable description paragraph that augments the base specs.

name.description: Localised display name. Falls back to base entry's name when absent.

tagline.description: Short headline shown on the card. Falls back to base entry's tagline when absent.

best_known_for.description: Single-line highlight rendered atop the OVERVIEW tab. Falls back to base entry's value when absent.

description.description: Editorial paragraph (2-4 sentences) rendered in the OVERVIEW tab below the spec grid. Required.
